§6Crystalline Fullerite§f

§aThe ultimate carbon allotrope — essential for pyrolysis ovens, quantum batteries, and end-game machinery!§f

Crystalline Fullerite is a late-game material essential for several advanced machines and upgrades. It is produced by combining §bFullerene§f with §bBTX§f in the §bOre Acidizer§f. It is used to forge the §bPyrolysis Oven§f, §bICF§f laser parts, §bHeavy Duty Elements§f, and the enormously expensive §bFEnSU§f.

§6Production§f:
§b• Ore Acidizer§f: §e4×§f Fullerene + §e1,000mB§f BTX → §e1×§f Crystalline Fullerite.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Pyrolysis Oven§f: §e4×§f required in the assembly recipe (gates access to advanced thermal processing).
§b• Quantum Battery§f (Chemical Plant): §e16×§f Crystalline Fullerite + Perfluoromethyl + Dense BSCCO Wire + Ionized Particles.
§b• Heavy Duty Element§f (Plasma Forge): Required for Gerald the Construction Android.
§b• FEnSU§f (Plasma Forge): §e64×§f for the most expensive machine in the mod.
§b• Overdrive Upgrades§f (Assembly Factory): Mk.I, Mk.II, and Mk.III all require Crystalline Fullerite.

§eTip§f: Crystalline Fullerite is §bnot renewable§f until you have a full BTX production chain running. Even then, the Fullerene supply depends on HPS production. Build a dedicated production line before attempting large-scale projects like Quantum Batteries or the FEnSU!
